title: Dragon Ball
titleNative: ドラゴンボール
synonyms: ดราก้อนบอล
synopsis: Dragon Ball follows the adventures of Son Goku from his childhood through adulthood as he trains in martial arts and explores the world in search of the seven mystical orbs known as the Dragon Balls, which can summon a wish-granting dragon when gathered. Along his journey, Goku makes several friends and battles a wide variety of villains, many of whom also seek the Dragon Balls for their own desires. Along the way becoming the strongest warrior in the universe. Part II of Dragon Ball is also known as "Dragon Ball Z" in North America. Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Konjiki no Word Master: Yuusha Yonin ni Makikomareta Unique Cheat
titleRomaji: Konjiki no Word Master: Yuusha Yonin ni Makikomareta Unique Cheat
titleNative: 金色の文字使い ―勇者四人に巻き込まれたユニークチート―
synonyms: Konjiki no Moji Tsukai: Yuusha Yonin ni Makikomareta Unique Cheat
synopsis: There has been much conflict between the races of the 'Humas', the 'Gabranth', and the 'Evila'. To combat the 'Evila' race's Demon King, the kingdom summons five high school students from 21st century Japan who have the power of Heroes. However, only four out of five of those students had the status title of 'Hero'. Okamura Hiiro was summoned by accident since he sat near the other four students in class. Unlike them, he did not have the title of a 'Hero' but instead he had the title of 'Word Master' and 'Innocent Bystander'. Seeing through the 'Humas' kingdom's deceit and insanity, Hiiro decides that he has no wish to partake in their selfish war. Leaving the castle, Hiiro decides to join the Adventurer's Guild and does whatever he feels like. Who knows? Maybe there is some merit to being a 'Word Master' and an 'Innocent Bystander'.

title: Hell Mode - The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing
titleRomaji: Hell Mode: Yarikomi Suki no Gamer wa Haisettei no Isekai de Musou Suru - Hajimari no Shoukanshi
titleEnglish: Hell Mode - The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing
titleNative: ヘルモード ～やり込み好きのゲーマーは廃設定の異世界で無双する～ はじまりの召喚士
synonyms: Hell Mode: Gamer Who Likes to Speedrun Becomes Peerless in a Parallel World with Obsolete Setting
HELL MODE: อยากเล่นโหด ขอโหมดนรก - นักอัญเชิญคนเเรก
地獄模式 ～喜歡挑戰特殊成就的玩家在廢設定的異世界成為無雙～ 起始的召喚士
synopsis: Kenichi Yamada, a single, 35-year-old businessman, has spent the majority of his adult life playing every MMORPG to hit the market. Tired of the constant cycle of repetitive, newbie-centric gameplay, he is immediately drawn in by the promise of a new game that, on top of being never-ending, offers up a “Hell Mode”—a difficulty level that makes it nigh impossible to level up but also promises uncapped growth potential. Upon selecting the newly released Summoner class, Kenichi finds himself reborn as Allen, an infant in a serf family, with nothing but his wits and old memories to guide him. Allen works diligently to level himself up despite Hell Mode requiring vast amounts of experience between levels. In doing so, he hopes to uncover the secrets the Summoner class holds. All the while, he dedicates himself to freeing his new family from serfdom. (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Captain Corinth: The Galactic Navy Officer Becomes an Adventurer
titleEnglish: Captain Corinth: The Galactic Navy Officer Becomes an Adventurer
titleNative: 航宙軍士官、冒険者になる
synonyms: The Galactic Navy Officer Becomes an Adventurer
The Starship Officer Becomes An Adventurer
synopsis: The distant future: In a universe where humanity's mortal enemy is the alien race known as Bugs, an Imperial battleship suffers a mysterious and devastating attack that sends Captain Alan Corinth crash landing onto an unknown planet. Much to his surprise, rather than the technologically advanced humanity he knows, the humans he encounters there seem to live in a fantasy world filled with swords and magic! (Source: One Peace Books)

title: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onna Shishoutachi ga Ikusei Houshin wo Megutte Shuraba
titleEnglish: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleNative: 最強女師匠たちが育成方針を巡って修羅場
synonyms: The Strongest Female Masters Are Warring Over Training Policy
synopsis: “These three could destroy the country all by themselves if they wanted… But there was one thing they just couldn't get.” For the three strongest adventurers in the world, finding a man strong enough to be with them is a herculean task. He simply doesn’t exist. With that in mind, they decide to take on a perfect novice—the level-zero, unremarkable Cross Alacart—and train him up to be their perfect match. Freshly expelled from Adventurers’ school, Cross sets his eyes on redemption; training hard and learning to believe in himself along the way. (Source: Comikey)

title: IDOL x IDOL STORY!
titleNative: IDOL×IDOL STORY！
synonyms: アイドル×アイドル　ストーリー！
synopsis: Meet Mimi, a college grad working part-time at a convenience store. Once an aspiring idol, she abandoned her dream when her group failed to make it big. Enter Ibuki, a rising star inspired by Mimi’s past. Their unexpected encounters reignite Mimi’s passion for the spotlight. Together, they decide to audition for a high-stakes idol competition show. Can they achieve their dreams and forge an unbreakable bond, or will the intense rivalry tear them apart? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Majo to Kyurasu
titleNative: 魔女とくゅらす
synopsis: In 16th century Europe, a witch helps her young apprentice escape a witch hunt and then disappears without a trace. Years later, in modern-day Japan, the apprentice finally tracks her down—only to find that the once-powerful witch is now a gloomy, apathetic woman who spends her days smoking by the window. What follows is a laid-back, offbeat comedy about the clash between a responsible apprentice and her completely unmotivated mentor. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: How to Love a Loser
titleNative: ダメ人間の愛しかた
synonyms: How to Love a Useless Person
synopsis: Shinba has no talent, no job, no money...he's a complete loser. However, he has a girlfriend, Hizumi who is beautiful, smart, good at her work. He has no idea why she says she likes him. He's almost scared, but loves Hizumi so much...he asks Hizumi, "Why do you want to date with someone like me?" She answers..."You always oversleep, talk about some video games I don't even know about, sing lame songs no one knows at karaoke, gave me a toy ring as a gift. Your face is always gloomy as hell. But...looking at such face makes me happy, Shinba. I love you, ha ha." Is she telling the truth? Hizumi must have some kind of a secret, Shinba thinks. He wants to find out...but maybe he shouldn't. (Source: BookWalker)

title: I Picked Up This World's Strategy Guide
titleRomaji: Kono Sekai no Kouryakuhon wo Hirotteshimaimashita
titleEnglish: I Picked Up This World's Strategy Guide
titleNative: この世界の攻略本を拾ってしまいました
synonyms: I Picked Up This World's Strategy Guide!
不小心撿起了這個世界的攻略書
synopsis: Sana is the hardworking daughter of a shop owner, and she often ventures out into the forest to gather the herbs needed for the restorative potions they sell. But on one trip, she happens to pick up a mysterious strategy guide for a game—and it's filled with detailed information about her town, those around her, and even what's yet to come! Except, the future may not be at all what she expects… With such a powerful—and dangerous—book in hand, what will Sana do? (Source: Yen Press)

titleNative: 魔性の乙女の役廻り
synopsis: Kairan Girls’ Academy: a boarding school rich with history and tradition, attended only by orphans. It has a special system in which students are given “roles” that align with their individual goals. Hanako Shimura, a kind-hearted girl filled with dreams and expectations, enrolls into the academy hoping to make friends with everyone at school. But will she be able to? (source: Comic Gamma Plus, translated)

synonyms: Blue Archive: Problem Solver 68 Business Diary
synopsis: Welcome to Kivotos, the Academy City, where students spend their daily lives armed. Follow the lives of the four girls who run a business here as they take on all kinds of odd jobs just to keep it afloat. With the self-proclaimed Outlaw CEO, Rikuhachima Aru, at the helm, Problem Solver 68 is always ready to stir up a storm! Tag along with the crew on their misadventures in the long-awaited official Blue Archive spin-off manga! (Source: Kaiten Books)

title: Shiroki Otome no Werewolf
titleNative: 白き乙女の人狼
synopsis: Hakurai Private Academy, a boarding school where young ladies receive a higher education in bridehood. Should the maidens lose their “purity” during the three year course, they are immediately expelled, losing any chance at their dreams of becoming brides. For the girls living at this school, it is a future they consider worse than death. One day, something happens in the dormitory of the student council! In their midst is a two-faced wolf aiming for their purity - and it is up to them to pull back the mask!

title: Suterare Shiro Mahoutsukai no Koucha Seikatsu
titleRomaji: Suterare Shiro Mahoutsukai no Koucha Seikatsu
titleNative: 捨てられ白魔法使いの紅茶生活
synopsis: In a quest to subdue a golden dragon, a white mage named Amalia is double-crossed by her party, leaving her for dead with her injuries. However, the dragon takes pity on her helpless situation and restores Amalia's health in exchange for a favor: observing human life. The dragon then takes the form of a child, using "Yuugo" as an alias. As Amalia accepts Yuugo's request, she soon realizes that ten years have since passed. Mixed with shock and confusion, Amalia tries to start a new life with Yuugo as a foster son, doing her best to fulfill her new objective. Soon enough, Yuugo begins to show interest in the culture of tea, and as someone adept in brewing them, Amalia's tea-laden life will now begin!

title: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleRomaji: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleNative: 怪異部～M県Y市の怪現象について～
synonyms: Kaiibu ~ M-ken Y-shi no Kai Genshou ni Tsuite~
synopsis: When transfer student Sakura Sakuraba arrives in Yuuyamichou, she discovers a place steeped in bizarre, ancient customs. The children there all have strange names and are bound by a curse that prevents them from leaving the city until they graduate high school. Caught in an escalating nightmare, Sakura must navigate curses, summonings, and betrayals. To break the curse and free the children, Sakura teams up with Uzu Andou, the mysterious president of the Paranormal Club. Their strange "club activities" are about to begin! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Beneath the Fur
titleNative: けがわとなかみ
synopsis: One day, a fox is ready to pounce on a rabbit, only to receive a confession from its would-be prey. Ignoring the fox's confusion, the rabbit professes, “I love you.” As this bold approach takes effect, the fox's hard heart begins, little by little, to soften. Will predator and prey ever be able to coexist…? (Source: Yen Press) Note: Includes three extra chapters.

titleNative: 断罪されたダメ王子、拾いました。
synonyms: I Groom A Stray Prince to Be Imperfect.
synopsis: Kuruhi, first prince of Gahama Kingdom, is the epitome of a spoiled brat with his arrogant attitude and behavior. After countless misdeeds, he is finally banished from the royal family and reduced to a commoner! The wandering, mud-covered former prince finds himself at an inn run by Emma, a girl who has a severe obsession with royalty drama. Emma is bewildered by the sudden appearance of her "Oshi", and determined to get him back on his feet, she embarks on a grand project! (Source: ComicGardo, translated)

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

tags.name: Royal Affairs
tags.description: Features nobility, alliances, arranged marriage, succession disputes, religious orders and other elements of royal politics.

title: Noppiki Naranu
titleNative: ノっぴきならぬ
synopsis: Seven years ago, Toraji met the most beautiful man he had ever seen. The time they spent together was as passionate as it was brief, and the man disappeared among the multitudes of Edo, the shogunate's capital. Toraji never learned his real name, or address, or occupation - but he never gave up on finding him again. Only, he didn't expect that when he did, the man would turn out to be the master of a high-class ryokan and restaurant, or that he would have a young daughter. How did this happen? Why did he run? Who is the child's mother and where is she? And most of all, will Toraji get a second chance to pursue the one great love of his life?

title: Sakura no Sekai
titleNative: 桜の世界
synopsis: Everyone in Sakura's world loves her. Her happy days are spent surrounded by three slightly strange but all wonderful friends. This is a story of a slightly mysterious world created by four overlapping souls, each searching for something missing. (Source: ComicWalker, translated) Note: Originally self-published, the work was collected into two volumes and published by Kadokawa on 2023-01-27 and 2023-02-27.

title: Horror at Doll’s Village
titleNative: 人形峠
synopsis: A group of high school students visits a rural village in the mountains to learn to live like farmers. But it seems like this village never existed before they arrived. And when mysterious events begin to happen, they start to wonder if any of them will make it out alive… (Source: Mangamo)

titleNative: 読心貴族～男女比1：99世界の悪役令息～
synopsis: Takayuki Shinohara (32), a librarian, gets caught in an earthquake, and finds himself in another world Apparently, he's now the son of a high-ranking noble, and he awakens just at the moment his own engagement being called off...!? With his mind-reading skill, he aims to leave his mark! A reincarnated-noble fantasy full of intrigue and adventure!! (Source: Shueisha, translated)

title: Millenium Mirage
titleNative: みれみら
synopsis: "Let’s make a child together!!" is what a girl who appeared out of the blue said. A pretty onee-sama and a cute girl, middle school student Takao Reiichi’s destiny is going to change in a big way since he met these two girls! Was their encounter a coincidence? Or something is bound to happen? Falling in love with the opposite sex and friendship?! Here comes another new love comedy!

title: Kubinashi Seirei-sama ni Kuchizuke wo
titleNative: 首なし精霊様に口づけを
synonyms: A Kiss For the Headless Spirit
synopsis: A deadly curse is slowly killing Teo, and none of the healers or magic users he's ever met have been able to help him - until one day, during his travels, he finds the natural spirit Arvahany. Arvahany hates humans and has secrets of his own, not the least of which is that he has lost a considerable part of his powers. Teo has something he wants, and so he binds him with a contract to save himself, promising Teo to break his curse at the end of it, as a reward. But will the two be able to save each other? It might be much harder than either of them thought...

title: Kiss toka Koi toka, NG nano ni
titleRomaji: Kiss toka Koi toka, NG nano ni
titleNative: キスとか恋とか、NGなのに
synopsis: Rio and Yakumo are members of the idol group KEy, formed through an audition program. One day, while wishing to become closer to the cool Yakumo, an unexpected kiss completely changes their relationship! It turns out Yakumo was actually a super-devoted fan, absolutely obsessed and in love with Rio! Since confessing his feelings, Yakumo's romantic and lustful desires have only escalated. Seeing the special side he only shows him, Rio begins to waver between friendship and love... (Source: Overlap, translated) Note: Includes two extra chapters.
